name: sistem-goals-dashboard
description: GoalProgress dashboard monorepo with Express backend and Vite React frontend.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.check: node --check backend/index.js && node --check backend/api/auth.js && node --check backend/api/goals.js && node --check backend/api/milestones.js && node --check backend/api/team.js && npm --prefix frontend run build
